title: FedEx India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: FedEx India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
